Fix all warnings and errors in one pass.
Use the available editor and diagnostics tools to inspect issues directly.
Use the editor tools to apply changes as needed.
Do not include patch blocks, diffs, or code fences in your response.
Return a short bullet summary of what you changed.
Got it ‚Äî I‚Äôll scan the workspace for diagnostics, fix all current warnings/errors, then rerun checks to confirm everything is clean in one pass.
I found a fatal compile issue in the LaTeX log; next I‚Äôll inspect `main.tex` and switch the build setup to the correct engine, then re-run diagnostics.
I‚Äôve identified the primary blockers; now I‚Äôll patch `main.tex` for engine/package issues and rerun a full build to clear remaining warnings.
Progress update: main compiles, but two real LaTeX errors remain. I‚Äôll fix those section files and then rerun full `pdflatex + biber` passes to clear warnings.
Nice progress: engine issues are fixed; now I‚Äôll patch remaining Unicode errors and duplicate labels, then run a final clean build check.

- Fixed `main.tex` engine/setup blockers: removed `fontspec`/`\setmainfont`, removed duplicate package loads, corrected invalid author macros, replaced `\spacing{1.5}` with `\setstretch{1.5}`, and added a valid `listings` style definition in `main.tex:28`, `main.tex:51`, `main.tex:77`, `main.tex:111`.
- Resolved all Unicode compile errors by replacing unsupported characters with LaTeX-safe forms (`CO$_2$`, `\(\Omega\)`, `32--35$^\circ$C`) in `sections/6Abstract.tex:8`, `sections/10ListOfUnits.tex:25`, `sections/11Intro.tex:22`, `sections/11Intro.tex:31`, `sections/14Meth.tex:10`, `sections/14Meth.tex:40`, `sections/15SysDes.tex:23`, `sections/15SysDes.tex:96`.
- Fixed multiply-defined figure labels by making them unique in `sections/16resultanalysis.tex:18`, `sections/16resultanalysis.tex:29`, `sections/16resultanalysis.tex:39`, `sections/16resultanalysis.tex:70`.
- Ran full diagnostics/build cycle (`pdflatex ‚Üí biber ‚Üí pdflatex ‚Üí pdflatex`) and verified `main.log` has no remaining LaTeX errors/warnings.
